summary: A clip from a local TV news segment. An anchor at a desk speaks beside an inset graphic of colorful spray-painted graffiti captioned FED BUILDING VANDALIZED. The segment cuts to footage of a brick federal building with dark spray-painted messages across its windows and lower wall, captioned U.S. Citizenship & Immigration Services building vandalized, Williston, and later to footage of uniformed officers standing on a grassy lawn near trees.

script.scene: An anchor speaks beside an inset of spray-painted graffiti captioned FED BUILDING VANDALIZED.
Footage of dark graffiti messages sprayed across a brick building's windows and wall; caption notes the USCIS building in Williston.
Footage of uniformed officers standing on a lawn near trees.

notable_text: FED BUILDING VANDALIZED; U.S. Citizenship & Immigration Services building vandalized; WILLISTON
